purpose: Authoritative retirement inventory for legacy Cerberus surfaces. A surface may not be deleted or archived until this file records replacement, parity evidence or intentional rejection, the deletion/archive commit, and rollback path.

surfaces.current_responsibility: Public composite GitHub Action entrypoint and input/output contract for current consumers.
surfaces.keep_reason: Existing consumers call misty-step/cerberus through the root action; changing this requires a public migration plan.
surfaces.rollback_path: Restore action.yml from the last compatible release tag.
surfaces.next_action: Keep aligned with dispatch.sh until a Rust action adapter proves the same pull_request behavior.

surfaces.current_responsibility: GitHub Actions preflight, hosted API dispatch, polling, verdict output, fork/draft skip handling, and fail-on-verdict behavior.
surfaces.rust_replacement: A Rust GitHub Action adapter backed by cerberus-cli and the ReviewRequest.v1 contract.
parity_evidence: cargo run --locked -p cerberus-cli -- github-action-request --event fixtures/github-actions/pull-request-opened.json --diff-file fixtures/github-actions/pull-request.diff --out tmp/github-action-request/review-request.json --run-id gha-run-021
surfaces.rollback_path: Keep dispatch.sh as the fallback action client until the Rust adapter is released.
surfaces.next_action: Wire action.yml to the Rust command and prove consumer workflow parity before deleting shell dispatch.

surfaces.current_responsibility: Writes the consumer workflow template for the current API-dispatch action.
surfaces.rust_replacement: cerberus-cli init or equivalent Rust scaffolder command.
parity_evidence: future Rust fixture: generated workflow matches templates/consumer-workflow-reusable.yml
surfaces.rollback_path: Retain bin/cerberus.js and templates until generated workflow parity is fixture-backed.
surfaces.next_action: Move scaffolding behavior behind a Rust CLI fixture, then deprecate the Node entrypoint.

surfaces.current_responsibility: Hosted review API, runtime supervision, API-mode contract docs, and migration instructions.
surfaces.rust_replacement: Rust API adapter that accepts source-agnostic ReviewRequest.v1 payloads and preserves current public API compatibility where still needed.
parity_evidence: future Rust fixture: POST /api/reviews and GET /api/reviews/:id compatibility
surfaces.rollback_path: Keep cerberus-elixir API serving compatibility traffic until Rust API adapter is deployed and verified.
surfaces.next_action: Capture hosted API request/response fixtures and map them to ReviewRequest.v1.

surfaces.current_responsibility: Legacy reviewer routing, panel execution, prompt rendering, local review command, and pipeline aggregation entrypoint.
surfaces.rust_replacement: cerberus-core reviewer execution and harness runtime backed by ReviewConfig.v1 and harness/model evaluation fixtures.
parity_evidence: cargo run --locked -p cerberus-cli --bin cerberus-peer-harness -- --harness pi --input fixtures/harnesses/peer-runner-input.json --output tmp/peer-runner-artifact.json

cargo run --locked -p cerberus-cli --bin cerberus-peer-harness -- --harness pi --input fixtures/harnesses/peer-runner-input.json --output tmp/peer-runner-transcript-artifact.json --prompt-output tmp/peer-runner-prompt.txt --transcript fixtures/harnesses/peer-transcript-with-finding.txt

cargo run --locked -p cerberus-cli --bin cerberus-peer-harness -- --harness pi --input fixtures/harnesses/peer-runner-input.json --output tmp/peer-runner-artifact.json --execution-plan-output tmp/peer-runner-execution-plan.json

CERBERUS_PEER_HARNESS_LIVE=1 cargo run --locked -p cerberus-cli --bin cerberus-peer-harness -- --harness pi --input fixtures/harnesses/peer-runner-input.json --output tmp/peer-runner-live-artifact.json --execution-plan-output tmp/peer-runner-live-plan.json (expected non-zero, writes plan, no artifact)

CERBERUS_PEER_HARNESS_LIVE=1 cargo run --locked -p cerberus-cli --bin cerberus-peer-harness -- --harness fixture-live --profiles fixtures/harnesses/live-peer-command-profiles.json --input fixtures/harnesses/peer-runner-input.json --output tmp/peer-runner-live-artifact.json --transcript-output tmp/peer-runner-live-transcript.txt
cargo run --locked -p cerberus-cli -- review-local --diff-file fixtures/local-review/local.diff --out tmp/local-review
cd cerberus-elixir && mix test test/cerberus/engine_test.exs test/cerberus/pipeline_test.exs test/mix/tasks/cerberus_review_test.exs
surfaces.rollback_path: Keep Elixir execution modules until Rust can replay the same local and API review fixtures.
surfaces.next_action: Port routing, budget-approved provider-backed peer evals, and hosted/API review fixtures before retiring Elixir execution.

surfaces.current_responsibility: Legacy verdict aggregation, finding normalization, dedupe, cost accounting, override handling, and persisted review state.
surfaces.rust_replacement: cerberus-core ReviewRunArtifact.v1 generation plus a Rust storage adapter when persistence is needed.
parity_evidence: cd cerberus-elixir && mix test test/cerberus/verdict_test.exs test/cerberus/verdict test/store_test.exs test/cerberus/store_review_run_test.exs
surfaces.rollback_path: Keep Elixir store and verdict modules until Rust artifacts cover legacy aggregate and persistence cases.
surfaces.next_action: Add Rust fixtures for confidence aggregation, dedupe, override, cost, malformed finding rows, and persisted run replay.

surfaces.current_responsibility: Legacy GitHub read tools, local repository read tools, and OpenRouter client surface.
surfaces.rust_replacement: Rust harness/provider adapters with explicit external boundaries.
parity_evidence: cd cerberus-elixir && mix test test/cerberus/github_test.exs test/cerberus/tools test/cerberus/local_repo_read_handler_test.exs
future Rust fixture: provider tool sandbox and repository read boundaries
surfaces.rollback_path: Keep Elixir tool modules until Rust adapters prove local and GitHub read safety.
surfaces.next_action: Model GitHub/local read tools as harness adapter capabilities instead of core semantics.

surfaces.current_responsibility: Legacy model defaults, product configuration, reviewer personas, and Pi skill prompts.
surfaces.rust_replacement: ReviewerConfigPacket.v1 imports promoted from measured Daedalus or harness/model evaluation evidence.
surfaces.rollback_path: Keep defaults and Pi prompts for the legacy Elixir path until Rust reviewer configs are promoted.
surfaces.next_action: Replace static defaults with measured reviewer config packets after live eval evidence exists.

surfaces.current_responsibility: Legacy hosted Elixir deployment and release smoke checks.
surfaces.keep_reason: Needed only while the hosted API compatibility surface remains Elixir-backed.
parity_evidence: future Rust deployment smoke for the replacement API adapter
surfaces.rollback_path: Restore deployment scripts if Rust API deployment fails after cutover.
surfaces.next_action: Define Rust API deployment smoke before archiving Elixir deployment scripts.

surfaces.current_responsibility: Historical review evidence, issue walkthroughs, and prior migration receipts.
surfaces.keep_reason: These are evidence artifacts, not active runtime surfaces; they should be archived only after current docs link the replacement receipts.
parity_evidence: docs/README.md labels historical walkthroughs as reference material
surfaces.rollback_path: Restore archived walkthroughs from the archive commit or release tag if a migration audit needs them.
surfaces.next_action: Create an archive index before moving or deleting historical walkthrough material.
